know anything. People
Catchment groups Are Yeah.
But catchment groups. I agree. Absolutely.
Alright, we much hope you can help push this forward
because we've been campaigning on this one on information
for a long time, and I think it's something which Parliament
as a whole should be able to agree on.
Yeah. Well, we, we do,
we'll make a recommendation right now, won't we?
Look, um, we're maybe we should write a letter. Yeah.
We've, we've certainly, um, all got interest in this.
Yeah, yeah. Obviously, which is why we had you to come in.
Well, thank you very, thank you very much. Come.
Thank you so much. Thank you all.
